functions.name: resolve_target
functions.purpose: Resolve dispatch target for a project_id
functions.returns: dict with cdp_endpoint, conversation_id, chat_url, agent_id, agent_role, cdp_active

functions.name: resolve_all
functions.purpose: Resolve targets for all registered projects

functions.name: build_dispatch_packet
functions.purpose: Package resolved target + task_spec + message for CDP delivery
functions.returns: dict with dispatchable=true/false + all routing info

functions.name: verify_isolation
functions.returns: dict with isolated=true/false, unique_ports, unique_conversations, unique_profiles, issues[]

dispatch_flow: 2. resolve_target(project_id) → registry lookup + binding read + CDP check
3. build_dispatch_packet(target, task_spec, message) → package for delivery
5. Per-project submission script delivers via CDP
